Document:
#Rituals & Sacrifices
## Transmutation is Key Eventually, you'll need to start using proper magics. To draw a [color=#8f63e6]Transmutation Rune[/color], you'll need a writing tool, such as a pen or crayon.
[color=red][bold]To start drawing a rune[/bold][/color], activate [color=green]Mansus Grasp[/color] in your offhand and click on the floor with your writing tool. These runes take a long time to draw, and are highly noticable, taking up a 3x3 area; however you can freely use other Heretics' runes.
[color=red][bold]To remove a rune[/bold][/color], use your pen on it with an activated [color=green]Mansus Grasp[/color] in your off-hand.
[color=red][bold]To choose a ritual[/bold][/color], simply click the rune with your empty hand and select one from the radial menu.
[color=red][bold]To start the ritual[/bold][/color], use your [color=green]Mansus Grasp[/color] on the rune once you've made a selection. You can always see your chosen ritual by [bold]inspecting[/bold] the rune.
[color=#8f63e6]Transmutation Rituals[/color] allow you to create powerful artifacts, demonic monsters, and many useful tools that will help you progress towards ultimate power.
## Sacrifices It's time for you to get your hands bloody and start sacrificing your beloved coworkers for [color=#8f63e6]Knowledge[/color].
If your target is in critical condition or dead, they're able to be sacrificed.
Drag them over a [color=#8f63e6]Transmutation Rune[/color] and invoke the [color=#8f63e6]Heartbeat of the Mansus[/color] ritual to sacrifice them.
Sacrificing a normal crewmember will gain you two [color=#8f63e6]Knowledge Points[/color], while a head of staff will net you three.
